name: template_6
code:
local Players = game:GetService("Players")
local STATS = { "{{S1}}", "{{S2}}" }
local function setup(plr)
	local ls = plr:WaitForChild("leaderstats")
	for _, n in ipairs(STATS) do
		local v = ls:FindFirstChild(n) or Instance.new("IntValue")
		v.Name = n
		v.Value = v.Value
		v.Parent = ls
	end
end
Players.PlayerAdded:Connect(function(p) task.defer(setup, p) end)
